title: Maptip
body:
**Maptip** - client-side mod adds a preview of filled maps directly in their tooltips, showing the actual map content inside a vanilla-style frame. 

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87311f3b4e25b7f8d3faad21ba2fc603dfed5764_0.webp)

The map preview size can be adjusted in the mod’s configuration screen, letting you choose a tooltip size that fits your UI scale and preference.

![settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ed7471a93efa531f84b58e80580a7a5bb21afdf.jpeg)

Inspired by [Map Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-tooltip).
